encounter.personal_note: Training for a marathon and enjoys photography.

clinical_note.history_of_present_illness: Patient reports waking up on her birthday with an unexpected increase in acne, associated with feelings from her teenage years. Lifelong self-consciousness about an unchanged birthmark on her left cheek.

previous_history.family_history: No known history of skin conditions in family.

clinical_note.review_of_systems: No fever or other systemic symptoms. Skin: Positive for new-onset acne and a birthmark on the left cheek.
clinical_note.physical_exam: Presence of multiple closed comedones and a few red, inflamed papules on the forehead and cheeks. Birthmark on left cheek is well-demarcated, not raised, stable and benign in appearance.

assessment.summary: Facial birthmark, likely nevus. Adult-onset acne.

clinical_note.plan: Prescribe topical retinoid for acne; reassure about benign birthmark; schedule follow-up to monitor acne treatment response.
